titleStmt.title: SII 20.118: original edition by G. S. Gai

No. 118. (B.K. No. 93-A of 1938-39.) In A.R.S.I.E. for 1938-39 the number given is 93. But it contains two records, one of Trailōkyamalla (Sōmēśvara I) and the other of this king. Here the former is given the No. 93 while the latter, No. 93-A, for the sake of convenience. KUYIBĀḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the mosque close to the village Chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year 11, Vibhava, Chaitra, śu. 15, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1148, April 4, Sunday, f.d.t. ·98. The eclipse, however, did not occur on that day.

The inscription records a gift of paddy (?) by the Gāvuṇḍas, Aṟuvattokkalu and others. It further records a gift of income from taxes, to the basadi at Kuyyabāḷa by herggaḍe Mādirāja and Ādityanāyaka at the instance of an officer (name lost) who was a Mahāpradhāna and Daṇḍanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada 11 ya vibhavasaṁvatsaradaThis is engraved in continuation of No. 32
caitra su15 Ādityavāramuṁ sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu gāu ṇḍugaḷuṁ hiṭṭukāṟaruṁ seṭṭiguttaruṁ Aṟu
vattokkaluṁ mukhyamāgi vokkalalikkaḷabhattamaṁ dānakke koṭṭaru
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ perjjuṁka vaḍḍarāuḷada daṇḍa nāyaka
yyaṁgaḷa besadiṁ herggaḍe mādirāja Ādityanāyakaru kuṁyyabāḷa basadige
davasada hēṟu 100 kke 5 hēṟiṁge kkahattiya maḷave 100 kke ṟa maḷaveya
nu mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jayakēsiyarasaru tamma neya bīravaṇadoḷage varsakke koṭṭa
bīravaṇadoḷage varṣakke koṭṭa paṇa 1 lekkada tannāyadali
matu hiṁdara malliseṭṭiya
ka bīravaṇa
yiṁ paḍedu jinaśāsanama .
Digital edition of SII 20.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
